channels.name: Siti Nurhaliza
channels.notes: Artist-official channel already used by the Phase 4.1 verified full-song source set. Phase 4.2 tooling treats this as a trusted seed but still requires title, duration and embeddability checks per video.

channels.name: SuriaRecords (SRC)
channels.notes: Label-official Suria Records channel already used by the Phase 4.1 verified source set. Individual uploads still require conservative matching and full-length evidence.

channels.name: MVM MUSIC
channels.notes: Licensed broadcaster channel already represented by an accepted Phase 4.1 source. Additional uploads require explicit review before activation.

channels.name: Siti Nurhaliza Official Artist Channel
channels.notes: Artist-official YouTube channel verified during Phase 4.3 via YouTube oEmbed author URL @sitinurhaliza and watch-page owner metadata on accepted full-length official lyric/music-video sources.

channels.name: Universal Music Malaysia
channels.notes: Label-official YouTube channel verified during Phase 4.3 via YouTube oEmbed and watch-page owner metadata for the accepted official Sesal music video.
